metadata.title: WordsGo - Ithute Tlotlontswe ka AI le Phetapheto e Katolositsoeng
metadata.description: Ntshetsa pele bokgoni ba hao ba puo ka phetapheto e katolositsoeng e tsamaiswang ka AI. Ipophele manane a hao a mantswe kapa o ithute ho tswa mananeng a phatlaladitsweng ke setshaba.
metadata.keywords: ithute senyesemane, phetapheto e katolositsoeng, moaho wa tlotlontswe, diflakarete, AI thuto ya puo, manane a mantswe, app ya thuto ya puo, ithute sespanishe, ithute sefora, ithute sejeremane, tsebo ya puo, hopola mantswe, SRS thuto
metadata.og_title: WordsGo - Thuto e bohlale ya Tlotlontswe
metadata.og_description: Ntshetsa pele bokgoni ba hao ba puo ka phetapheto e katolositsoeng e tsamaiswang ka AI. Ithute kapele, hopola nako e telele.
metadata.og_image_alt: WordsGo AI App ya Thuto ya Puo
metadata.twitter_title: WordsGo - Ithute Mantswe a Matjha ka Bonolo
metadata.twitter_description: Kopanya le WordsGo ho hodisa tlotlontswe ya hao o sebedisa phetapheto e bohlale le AI.

common.title: Sehlooho
common.no_data: Ha ho na data e fumanehang
common.offline_mode: Mokgwa wa ho se be inthaneteng

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Ho ithuta {target} ho tswa ho {source}
dashboard.community_lists_desc: Sheba manane a mantswe a setshaba le dilenane tsa dipina ho tswa ho basebedisi ba bang.
dashboard.ai_practice_desc: Ntshetsa pele tlotlontswe ya hao ka ho fetolela dipolelo tse hlahisitsweng ke AI ho latela sehlooho leha e le sefe kapa lenane la hao la mantswe.
dashboard.manage_words_desc: Sheba, batla, fetola kapa tlosa mantswe pokellong ya hao.
dashboard.import_error_retry: Re hlolehile ho boloka lentswe la hao le letjha. A re lekeng hape!
dashboard.generate_word_list_error: Ho hlolehile ho hlahisa lenane la mantswe.
dashboard.select_topic_error: Ka kopo kgetha sehlooho kapa o kenye taba ya hao.
dashboard.word_placeholder: Lentswe le lokelang ho fetolelwa (mohlala: apole)
dashboard.ai_translation_notice: AI e tla thusa ka tlhaloso le polelo ya mohlala
dashboard.auto_translate: Fetolela karolo e se nang letho ka boiketsetso
dashboard.delete_confirm: Na o kgetha ho tlosa lentswe lena?
dashboard.delete_all_confirm: Na o kgetha ho tlosa mantswe a hao OHLE? Ketso ena e ke ke ya kgutliswa.
dashboard.no_words_found: Ha ho mantswe a fumanweng. Leka lentswe le leng la ho batla kapa o eketse mantswe!
dashboard.no_words_for_lesson: Ha ho mantswe a fumanweng bakeng sa thuto. Ka kopo eketsa mantswe a matjha lenaneng la hao pele!
dashboard.no_words_to_review: Ha o na mantswe a ho a hlahloba kajeno. Khutla hamorao kapa o eketse mantswe a matjha!
dashboard.lesson_complete_desc: Mosebetsi o motle! O hlahlobile mantswe a hao bakeng sa kajeno.
dashboard.practice_setup_title: Tokisetso ya ho Ithuta ka AI
dashboard.practice_setup_desc: Kenya sehlooho ho hlahisa dipolelo tse ikgethileng bakeng sa hao!
dashboard.practice_topic_hint: Ha o ka e siya e se na letho, e tla hlahisa dipolelo ho latela tlotlontswe ya hao.
dashboard.footer_help_text: Re thuse ho ntlafatsa! Arolelana maikutlo a hao, tlaleha diphoqo, kapa o kope dintlha tse ncha:
dashboard.support_desc: Haeba o rata app ena, o ka tshehetsa ntshetsopele ya yona.

onboarding.journey_begins: Leeto la hao la ho tseba puo le qala mona.
onboarding.strategy_desc: Ho fumana molemo o moholo ho WordsGo, re kgothaletsa leano lena le bonolo:
onboarding.step1_desc: Eketsa mantswe a ka bang 100 a amanang le sehlooho se le seng (mohlala, Kgwebo kapa Leeto) ho haha boemo bo matla.
onboarding.step2_desc: Tseba mantswe ana ka phetapheto ya letsatsi le letsatsi ho fihlela e e ba karolo ya tlotlontswe ya hao.
onboarding.step3_desc: Fetela ho Ithute ka AI ho sebedisa tlotlontswe ya hao e ncha dipolelong tse tletseng le maemong a nnete a lefatshe.

dashboard.publish_desc: Arolelana pokello ena ya mantswe a {count} le basebedisi ba bang. E tla bonahala gallery-ng ya Manane a Phatlaladitsweng.
dashboard.list_title_placeholder: mohlala: Tlotlontswe ya Bohlokwa ya IT
dashboard.list_desc_placeholder: Lenane lena le mabapi le eng?

dashboard.publish_error: Ho hlolehile ho phatlalatsa lenane la mantswe.

dashboard.inline_add_error: Ka kopo fana ka lentswe la mantlha le phetolelo
dashboard.save_batch_success: Mantswe a {count} a bolokilwe lenaneng la hao ka katleho!
dashboard.save_batch_error: Ho hlolehile ho boloka mantswe. Ka kopo leka hape.
dashboard.no_words_to_save: Ha ho na mantswe a ho bolokwa
dashboard.remove_duplicates_error: Ka kopo tlosa mantswe a iphetang pele o boloka.
dashboard.remove_duplicates_publish_error: Ka kopo tlosa mantswe a iphetang pele o phatlalatsa.

topics.home: Lehae le Bophelo ba Letsatsi le Letsatsi

ai_word_info.error_coffee_break: AI e nka nako e nyane ya ho phomola. Ka kopo leka hape haufinyane!
ai_word_info.error_generic: Tjhe! Re hlolehile ho fumana dintlha tsa AI. A re lekeng hape!

public_lists.search_placeholder: Batla manane ka sehlooho kapa tlhaloso...
public_lists.no_lists_found: Ha ho na manane a fumanweng
public_lists.no_lists_desc: Leka ho batla ho hong kapa o fetole dihlodi tsa puo ya hao.
public_lists.load_error: Re hlolehile ho laela manane a phatlaladitsweng hona jwale.
public_lists.no_description: Ha ho na tlhaloso e fanweng.
public_lists.playlists_no_found: Ha ho na dilenane tsa dipina tse fumanweng
public_lists.playlists_no_lists: Ha ho na manane a phatlaladitsweng a fumanehang

detail.title: Dintlha tsa Lenane
detail.added_success: Mantswe a kentswe pokellong ya hao ka katleho!
detail.added_error: Ho hlolehile ho eketsa mantswe pokellong ya hao.
detail.delete_confirm: Na o kgetha ho tlosa lenane lena la phatlalatsa? Ketso ena e ke ke ya kgutliswa.
detail.duplicate_error: Ho na le mantswe a iphetang lenaneng. Ka kopo a tlose pele o boloka.

profile.terms_welcome: Rea u amohela ho WordsGo. Ka ho sebedisa ditshebeletso tsa rona, o dumellana le melao ena...
profile.title: Dipehelo tsa Profil
profile.leave_empty: Siya ho se na letho ho boloka phasewete ya hona jwale
profile.subtitle: Laola dintlha tsa hao le dipehelo tsa puo

register.title: Theha akhaonto ya hao
register.password_hint: E tlameha ho ba bonyane ditlhaku tse 8
register.has_account: Na u se u ntse u e-na le akhaonto?

best_practice.title: Tsela e Molemohadi ya Katleho
best_practice.strategy_desc: Bakeng sa phihlelo e atlehileng ya ho ithuta, re kgothaletsa leano lena le bonolo la mehato e 3:
best_practice.step1_desc: Eketsa mantswe a ka bang 100 a shebaneng le sehlooho se le seng (mohlala, Leeto kapa Kgwebo) ho bopa boemo.
best_practice.step2_desc: Tseba mantswe ana ka phetapheto ya letsatsi le letsatsi ho fihlela e e ba karolo ya tlotlontswe ya hao.
best_practice.step3_desc: Fetela ho Ithute ka AI ho sebedisa tlotlontswe ya hao e ncha dipolelong tse tletseng le maemong a nnete a lefatshe.

getting_started.title: Ho Qala
getting_started.desc: WordsGo ke sesebelisoa se matla se etselitsoeng ho u thusa ho holisa tlotlontswe ea hau le ho ntlafatsa bokgoni ba hau ba puo u sebelisa phetapheto e katolositsweng le bohlale ba maiketsetso.
getting_started.step1_desc: Eketsa mantswe ka bowena kapa o sebedise AI ho hlahisa manane ho latela dihlooho le maemo.
getting_started.step2_title: Mohato oa 2: Thuto ya Letsatsi le Letsatsi
getting_started.step2_desc: Sebedisa Tlhahlobo ya Tlotlontswe ho hopola mantswe o sebedisa algorithm ya FSRS.

manual.title: Ho Kenya ka Bowena
manual.desc: Kenya lentswe ka puo eo u ithutang yona le phetolelo ya lona. O ka eketsa tlhaloso kapa boemo bakeng sa ho hopola hamolemo.

auto_translate.title: Phetolelo ya Boiketsetso
auto_translate.desc: Sebedisa karolo ya "Auto-translate" bakeng sa phetolelo ya hang-hang ka tshebeletso ya DeepL.

ai_list.title: Tlhahiso ya Lenane (AI Word List)
ai_list.desc: Kgetha boemo (A1-C2) le sehlooho, mme AI (Gemini) e tla bokella lenane la mantswe a loketseng bakeng sa hao, a ka eketsoang bukantsweng ya hao ka ho tobetsa hanngoe.

ai_insights.title: Dintlha tsa AI
ai_insights.desc: Bakeng sa lentswe le leng le le leng, AI e ka fana ka mantswe a tswang mohloohong o le mong, mehlala ya tshebediso, le dintlha tsa thutapuo.

spaced_repetition.title: Phetapheto e Katolositsweng
spaced_repetition.desc: WordsGo e sebedisa algorithm ya FSRS (Free Spaced Repetition Scheduler) ho bala nako e nepahetseng ya ho pheta lentswe le leng le le leng.
spaced_repetition.step1: O bontshwa lentswe ka puo ya mantlha.
spaced_repetition.step2: Kenya phetolelo mme o tobetse Enter kapa Hlahloba Karabo.
spaced_repetition.step3: Haeba o sa hopole — tobetsa "Ha ke hopole" ho bona karabo.
spaced_repetition.step4: Algorithm e tla bala hape letsatsi le hlahlamang la tlhahlobo ho latela karabelo ya hao.

ai_practice.title: Ithute ka AI: Phetolelo ya Polelo
ai_practice.desc: Karolo ena e thusa ho kwetlisetsa thutapuo le boemo ka ho fetolela dipolelo tse tletseng tse qapiloeng ke AI ka ho kgetheha bakeng sa hao.
ai_practice.how_it_works: Mokgwa oo ho sebetsang ka wona:
ai_practice.step1: Kgetha sehlooho (mohlala, "Kgwebo", "Leeto") kapa o siye karolo eo e se na letho.
ai_practice.step2: AI e tla hlahisa dipolelo tse 5 sehloohong se kgethilweng.
ai_practice.step3: Romela phetolelo ya hao mme o fumane dintlha tse qaqileng.
ai_practice.step4: AI e tla supa diphoqo mme e fane ka phetolelo e hloahloa e nang le ditlhaloso.

dictionary_management.title: Tsamaiso ya Bukantswe
dictionary_management.search: Batla: Sebedisa bar ya ho batla ho fumana mantswe kapele pokellong ya hao.
dictionary_management.sorting: Ho hlophisa: Sheba lenane la mantswe ohle a hao ka kgetho ya ho a tlosa.
dictionary_management.delete_all: Tlosa mantswe ohle: Bokgoni ba ho hlakola bukantswe ya hao ka ho feletseng ka ho tobetsa hanngoe.

progress.title: Tsoelopele le Dintlha
progress.desc: Ntlha ya hao (karolong e ka hodimo ya app) e bontsha palo ya mantswe a fetoletsweng ka nepo. Ha ntlha e phahame, ke mantswe a mangata ao u a tsebileng ka katleho!
